footer.tagline: Strategic innovation. Community impact. Measurable results.
footer.jurisdictions: Serving clients across Canada, the United States, and internationally.

hero.subheadline: CivSafe delivers evidence-based consulting, AI readiness frameworks, and agile transformation programs that create lasting organizational and community impact.

services.headline: End-to-End Capacity Building for Complex Environments

aiReadiness.title: AI Readiness & Strategy
aiReadiness.description: Structured assessment frameworks and implementation roadmaps that position your organization to leverage artificial intelligence with confidence and governance rigor.

automation.title: Process Automation & Digital Transformation
automation.description: Systematic analysis and re-engineering of operational workflows, delivering measurable efficiency gains and scalable digital infrastructure.

agile.title: Agile Transformation & Coaching
agile.description: Practitioner-led coaching programs that embed adaptive delivery capabilities across teams, portfolios, and enterprise functions.

civic.title: Civic Technology Consulting
civic.description: Strategic advisory for municipalities, provinces, and crown corporations navigating the intersection of technology, policy, and community engagement.

leadership.title: Leadership Development & Team Tuning
leadership.description: High-impact facilitation and coaching engagements that develop cross-functional leadership capability and unlock organizational performance.

grant.title: Grant Strategy & Stakeholder Engagement
grant.description: Comprehensive support for funding applications, stakeholder alignment, and community consultation processes that satisfy regulatory and funder requirements.

stats.headline: Delivering Outcomes That Move the Needle

team.headline: Practitioners Who Have Done the Work
team.subheadline: Our leadership team brings together decades of cross-sector experience in technology, public policy, organizational design, and community development.

jesse.title: Founder & Principal Strategist
jesse.bio: With two decades at the intersection of technology, organizational design, and community development, Jesse has led transformations for municipal governments, crown corporations, and Fortune 500 enterprises. His practitioner-first philosophy has made CivSafe a trusted partner for leaders navigating complex change.

margaret.title: Director, Public Sector Innovation
margaret.bio: Dr. Chen brings 18 years of senior advisory experience within federal and provincial government, including stints at the Privy Council Office and the BC Ministry of Citizens' Services. Her expertise in evidence-based policy design and public sector digital transformation underpins CivSafe's government practice.

robert.title: Senior Advisor, Government Relations
robert.bio: Robert's 25-year career spans deputy minister-level advisory roles, board directorships, and senior consulting engagements with national and international clients. He specializes in stakeholder alignment, grant strategy, and navigating the political economy of large-scale public investment programs.

priya.title: Lead, Digital Transformation
priya.bio: Priya leads CivSafe's enterprise automation and AI readiness practice. Prior to joining the firm, she held senior product and transformation roles at two of Canada's Big Five banks and a national logistics company, delivering complex technology portfolios in regulated environments.

calgary.quote: CivSafe brought a level of strategic clarity and implementation rigour we hadn't experienced before. They didn't just hand us a report — they built the capability within our teams to sustain the transformation.
calgary.author: Director of Digital Strategy

ontario.quote: The framework they developed gave us the language, the evidence, and the governance structure to take AI investment proposals through Treasury Board with confidence. That's not a small thing.
ontario.author: Assistant Deputy Minister

bcHousing.quote: Jesse and his team understood something most agile consultants miss: you can't impose methodology on a culture. They built trust first, then built capability. The results speak for themselves.
bcHousing.author: Vice President, Technology & Innovation

cta.headline: Ready to Transform Your Organization?
cta.subheadline: Whether you are pursuing a strategic mandate, a funding opportunity, or an organizational transformation, we bring the expertise to deliver.
